title: Unable to optimize `(a % 1) == 0`
code_blocks:
#!/usr/bin/env python3

from nmigen import *
from nmigen.back.verilog import convert

a = Signal(32)
b = Signal(32)
m = Module()

with m.If((a % 1) == 0):
   m.d.sync += b.eq(a)

print(convert(m, ports=(a,b), strip_internal_attrs=True))
